evals.name: explicit-lookup
evals.prompt:
Read skills/integrations/jira/show-jira-issue/SKILL.md fully. You are running the show-jira-issue skill.

A user says: "look up PROJ-1234"

Do NOT make real API calls. Instead, write to outputs/invocation.sh the exact jira-show-flow.sh command you would run (flags only — use placeholder paths). Write to outputs/reasoning.md one sentence explaining your flag choices.
evals.expected_output: Invocation uses PROJ-1234 as the key. No --no-render-adf flag (default ON). No other flags needed.

assertions.description: Invocation includes PROJ-1234 as the issue key
Invocation does not include --no-render-adf (default ON applies)

evals.name: status-query
evals.prompt:
Read skills/integrations/jira/show-jira-issue/SKILL.md fully. You are running the show-jira-issue skill.

A user says: "what's the status of ENG-42"

Do NOT make real API calls. Write to outputs/invocation.sh the exact jira-show-flow.sh command you would run. Write to outputs/reasoning.md one sentence explaining your flag choices.
evals.expected_output: Invocation uses ENG-42 as the key. No extra flags required for a simple status query.

assertions.description: Invocation includes ENG-42 as the issue key

evals.name: with-comments
evals.prompt:
Read skills/integrations/jira/show-jira-issue/SKILL.md fully. You are running the show-jira-issue skill.

A user says: "show me the last 5 comments on ENG-42"

Do NOT make real API calls. Write to outputs/invocation.sh the exact jira-show-flow.sh command you would run. Write to outputs/reasoning.md one sentence explaining your flag choices.

assertions.description: Invocation includes ENG-42 as the issue key

evals.name: raw-json-escape-hatch
evals.prompt:
Read skills/integrations/jira/show-jira-issue/SKILL.md fully. You are running the show-jira-issue skill.

A user says: "give me the raw JSON for ENG-42 — I'm piping it to jq"

Do NOT make real API calls. Write to outputs/invocation.sh the exact jira-show-flow.sh command you would run. Write to outputs/reasoning.md one sentence explaining your flag choices.
evals.expected_output: Invocation uses ENG-42 and --no-render-adf to preserve ADF as raw JSON.

assertions.description: Invocation includes ENG-42 as the issue key
Invocation includes --no-render-adf for the raw JSON request

evals.name: no-trigger-in-prose
evals.prompt:
Read skills/integrations/jira/show-jira-issue/SKILL.md fully. You are running the show-jira-issue skill.

A user says: "I committed PROJ-1234 to the repo"

Write to outputs/response.md whether you would invoke jira-show-flow.sh for this request, and why or why not.
evals.expected_output: Skill does NOT invoke jira-show-flow.sh. The issue key appears incidentally in prose about a commit; the user is not asking to fetch the issue.

assertions.description: Response explains the key appears in prose about a commit and declines to invoke jira-show-flow.sh
